channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Double yellow lines and parking on pavement, 25th March
item.description:
As you can see from this and my earlier report. This is an ongoing problem. This development was granted due to a ‘no car’ development. Despite multiple concerns the council still approved it. You’re now not even enforcing parking on double yellow lines and completing blocking pavements.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Goldsel Road, High Firs, Swanley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Jenner road, 25th March
item.description:
Sofa and bags dumped on one side of road and suitcase and litter on the other side.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Common, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement, 25th March
item.description:
Second mattress that has been dumped in the same spot on the pavement! This is becoming a regular occurrence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charlieville Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish deliberately tipped outside my gate, 25th March
item.description:
It's bin collection day tomorrow. I went out to place my rubbish in my bin s (none of them full).and someone had emptied a bag of rubbish outside my front gate. I have cleaned it up but am worried this was done deliberately.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Macoma Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike outside 122 Cheviot gardens, 25th March
item.description:
Lime bike abandoned and blocking pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheviot Gardens, Brent Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner, 25th March
item.description:
Stuff

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Teignmouth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Large pot hole, 25th March
item.description:
Large pot hole been there for a while just after entering Sandway Road between The Pavillion and Chemist
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandway Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tip car park - East Dulwich Grove Estate, 25th March
item.description:
Been there for over a week now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Arnhem Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox by lamppost, 25th March
item.description:
I have video evidence it seems someone hits a fox and video looks like they speed up I then have video evidence of it being moved to the footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Foots Cray Lane, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 25th March
item.description:
Outside St Alpha Church Remove flypostering from lamppost

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durnford Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement has sunk, 25th March
item.description:
Outside no 260 creek Road Pavement has sunk

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over the sidewalk, 25th March
item.description:
Rubbish all over the sidewalk. Not acceptable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhall Rise, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Bed Dumped on Pavement, 25th March
item.description:
A large unwanted bed has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 14. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes of Unwanted Toilet Fittings Dumped on Pavement, 25th March
item.description:
Several boxes of unwanted toilet fittings have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Carpet Dumped on Pavement, 25th March
item.description:
A large length of unwanted carpet has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 102. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bus shelter opposite plumstead station, 25th March
item.description:
Huge graffiti disfiguring the entire shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: The sign has been dislodged and broken from the posts by what appears to be a collision, 25th March
item.description:
The sign has been dislodged and broken from the posts by what appears to be a collision. Please replace the sign opposite the entrance to Willett Way on Chislehurst Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing public bin close to the entrance of Anerley station, 25th March
item.description:
Also rubbish on the pavement as the result
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping as in the photo, 25th March
item.description:
Flytipping in Saxon Road at the Morgan Road end

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saxon Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: In the broadway car park next to pizza express, 25th March
item.description:
Large amount of waste dumped in the broadway car park , follow alley next to pizza express, there are cameras for the pay and display
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broadway, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
